properties.name: coco.tenant.sql.enabled
properties.description: Whether Coco registers the MyBatis-Plus tenant line inner interceptor when tenant and MyBatis-Plus are available.

properties.name: coco.tenant.sql.tenant-id-column
properties.description: Database column used by the tenant line interceptor.

properties.name: coco.tenant.sql.ignore-tables
properties.description: Table names that should not receive tenant SQL conditions.

properties.name: coco.tenant.sql.fail-on-missing-context
properties.description: Whether Coco throws a tenant context exception when SQL isolation needs a tenant but no tenant context exists.
